infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Resonance needs your location to send it during an SOS alert.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Resonance needs your contacts to let you pick a trusted anchor person.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Resonance uses the microphone to detect your exhale during de-escalation.
